description: CAPT-BAND — EQUIPMENT-SCOPED recipe for sgm-004: match on the equipment axis ALONE so the active-recipe band resolves regardless of the article. This closes a live-data gap: the REAL ERP (erpdb.llm_test_v3) keys orders by numeric article codes (e.g. 14-0204-003, 12-0044-002) that do NOT equal the demo article names (housing-A, bracket-B), and carries NO setup/mould column. The it-evaluator RecipeBandResolver picks the active production order on sgm-004 (status=in_arbeit, most-recent), resolves the band here by equipment, and delivers it to the edge on i3x.recipe.band.sgm-004. The article-specific recipes (recipe-sgm-004-pa66gf30-housing-a.json / -bracket-b.json) still win FIRST per ref when a demo article IS active (recipeId-sorted, first-match-wins); this default catches every real article. The bands mirror the housing-A SOLL (the documented part currently set up on sgm-004). Edit a band here + push -> live on the next it-evaluator refresh, no redeploy; the edge applies the delivered numbers literal-only.
